verses.text: Keimah Paul, leh Silas, leh Timoti in Pa Pasian leh Topa Jesuh Khrih sungah a om Thesalonika khua-a ompawlpi mite tungah lai ka hong khak uh hi. Pasian in note tungah dikna leh nopsakna thupha hong tungsak ta hen.

sections.sectionTitle: Thesalonika khuamite in Upna A Neihna leh Etteh Hoih Ahihna

verses.text: Note khempeuh hangin Pasian tungah lungdamna ko tawntungin, ka thungetna uhah note ka hong phawk tawntung uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh i Pa Pasian kiangah thu ka nget simun note' upna hangin na nuntakziate uh, itna na neih manun nakpi takin na nasepnate uh leh i Topa Jesuh Khrih hong paikik ding lametna na neih manun kiptakin na omnate uh ka phawk tawntung uh hi
Sanggamte aw, Pasian in note hong itin ama mi dingin a hong teel khitna thu ka thei uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah Lungdamna Thu ka hong hilh lai-un kam bek tawh a hong gen hiloin, Kha Siangtho' vangliatna leh Lungdamna Thu a man taktak hi, ci-in theihna tawh a hong pai ka hi uh hi. Note kiangah ka om laitakun note' phattuamna dingin ka sep ka bawlna khempeuh uh na thei uh hi
Kote leh Topa' gamtat bangin note na gamta uh a, note in gimna nakpi takin thuaklawh napi-in Kha Siangtho' huhna tawh lungdam takin thu umin na om uh hi
Tua ahih manin Masedonia gam leh Akhaia gamsung khempeuhah thu um mi khempeuhte-a' dingin etteh hoih na suak uh hi
Note' gamtatna ziate' hangin Masedonia leh Akhaia gam sungteng bekah Topa' thu a kithei hiloin, note in Pasian na upna thu uh mun khempeuhah kiza ahih manin kote' gen ding bangmah kisam nawnlo hi
Note kiangah ka hong pai lai-un kote na hong limbawlna thu uh, leh a nungta a man Pasian' thu zui-in a bia ding

leh a hong tungding Pasian' hehna panin eite a hong honkhia, sihna panin Pasian in a thawhsakkik a Tapa Jesuh, van panin a hong paiding ngak dingin milim paisanin Pasian' lamah na kiheina uh thute mi khempeuh in gen belin a nei uh hi.
